metadata.description: Plan-first workflows for Claude Code and Factory Droid. Ships flow-next: zero-dep, spec-driven, Ralph autonomous mode.

plugins.name: flow-next
plugins.description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking and Ralph autonomous mode (multi-model review gates). Worker subagent per task for context isolation. Includes 21 subagents, 24 commands, 28 skills.
